name: One Bullet To Sprunki
description: One Bullet To Sprunki is a thrilling bullet hell game where you tap to play, release to shoot, and annihilate the evil threatening the realm. With roguelike elements, endless gameplay, dungeon crawling, and intense shooting, this offline game challenges your reflexes and strategy. Equip powerful gear, unleash a storm of bullets, and survive the chaos! Our web dev <a href='https://www.kizi10.org/'>https://www.kizi10.org/</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Mentolatux, Shooting, Skills, Sprunki, Unity3D, weapons, WebGL
